title: Algebra Level 1 — Prompt Contract Schema
description: Defines the structured contract for prompts used in Algebra Level 1 sessions. Prompts must conform to this schema before being issued to the student.

domain_pack_version.description: Version of the domain pack active when this prompt was generated

skills_targeted.description: Skills this prompt is designed to exercise

theme.description: World simulation theme applied to this prompt (immersion only)

hint_level.description: For hint prompts: level of hint (1=minimal, 3=nearly complete)

standing_order_trigger.description: For scaffold/intervention prompts: which standing order triggered this

references.description: Retrieved artifacts cited in this prompt (grounding contract)

grounded.description: Whether all claims in this prompt are grounded in cited artifacts
